title: Quantum computing threats to current cryptography: reality or hype (post-quantum cryptography presentation)
summary: NKSC Cyberpusryciai presentation on post-quantum cryptography, covering PQC algorithm selection, cryptographic inventory and testing for the transition to quantum-resistant algorithms.

title: Post-quantum cryptography
summary: NKSC news item presenting post-quantum cryptography as a key step in strengthening Lithuania's digital resilience and ensuring long-term security.

title: Digital Europe Programme calls (info day presentation)
summary: NKSC info-day presentation on Digital Europe Programme funding calls, including the deployment of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in systems across industrial sectors.

title: Guidelines for cryptography use inventory
summary: NKSC guidance on conducting a cryptographic inventory, explicitly referencing post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as part of preparing for the quantum-resistant transition.

title: CTAC 2024 Yearly Report
summary: Yearly report published via Lithuania's NKSC discussing standardisation of quantum-resistant algorithms and the NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) project.

title: Overview of the cybersecurity status in Lithuania: key information
summary: NKSC overview of cybersecurity trends and statistics in Lithuania, identifying the transition to post-quantum cryptography as one of the most important decisions for the near future.
